zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl於1362年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾阿拉吉時，她的父親David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl30歲，母親Elizabeth de Ferrers27歲。她於1376年3月20日與Ralph Percy在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1395年11月2日享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl于1362年出生在英国苏格兰培爾阿拉吉时，她的父亲David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl30岁，母亲Elizabeth de Ferrers27岁。她于1376年3月20日与Ralph Percy在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1395年11月2日享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl was born in 1362, in Aberargie, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth de Ferrers, was 27. She married Ralph Percy on 20 March 1376, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 2 November 1395, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl est née en 1362, à Aberargie, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Ferrers, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Percy le 20 mars 1376, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 2 novembre 1395, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl 1362 in Aberargie, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Ferrers 27. Sie hat am 20. März 1376 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland Ralph Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 2. November 1395 im Alter von 33 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl è nata il nel 1362 nel Aberargie, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Ferrers, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Percy il 20 marzo 1376, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 2 novembre 1395, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa de Strathbogie of Athollが1362年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーアルジで生まれた時，父David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Athollは30歳，母Elizabeth de Ferrersは27歳であった。1376年3月20日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーでRalph Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1395年11月2日に33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl(이)가 1362년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 압라르기에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Ferrers(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1376년 3월 20일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 Ralph Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 11월 2일 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl nasceu em 1362, em Aberargie, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Ferrers, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Percy em 20 de março de 1376, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 2 de novembro de 1395, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl родилась в 1362 г. в местности абирарги, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Ferrers, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Percy 20 марта 1376 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 2 ноября 1395 г. в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl nació en 1362, en Aberargie, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Ferrers, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ralph Percy el 20 de marzo de 1376, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 2 de noviembre de 1395, a la edad de 33 años.
